title: The Reason Why 'Uthman Ordered 'Abdall ah b. 'Abbas to Lead the Pilgrimage in This Year
description: 'Abbas to Lead the Pilgrimage in This Year According to Muhammad b. 'Umar al-Wagidi-Usamah b. Zayd-Dawud b. al-Hugayn-'Ikrimah-('Abdallah) b. 'Abbas: (This took place] when 'Uthman was under siege for the last time. 'Ikrimah states: I asked Ibn 'Abbas, " Were there two sieges?" Ibn 'Abbas replied, "There were." The first siege lasted for twelve [days]. When the Egyptians appeared, 'Ali met them at Dhu Khushub and induced them to leave. By God, 'Ali was a sincere friend to ('Uthman), until he aroused 'Ali's anger against him.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
